metrics.command_line: ln -s '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/40/inputs/dataset_e2cd6872-dc91-40a3-be37-2c2eecb0a7d4.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/40/inputs/dataset_3e3406a4-f780-4c21-bba2-9ad74cfabd72.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/40/inputs/metadata_metadata_50313ed7-c0c7-455a-b5f4-cfc764d52512.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
